description: List all users registered in the VYRA user management system. Returns a JSON-encoded list of user objects including username, email, role, level, and status.

returns.name: success
returns.description: Indicates whether the operation was successful

returns.name: message
returns.description: A message providing additional information about the result

returns.name: users
returns.description: JSON-encoded array of user objects. Each object contains: user_id, username, email, role, level, enabled, created_at, last_login
